scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n worker,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix worker" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.dev:remote: concurrently -k -n worker,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:remote --prefix worker" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:worker && npm run deploy:web
scripts.deploy:web: cd web && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name kong-news-kong-mud --commit-dirty=true
